cards.back: The near future of AI could lead to widespread automation of jobs, potentially displacing certain workers and requiring significant retraining programs.
AI could enable the development of highly personalized medical treatments, tailoring therapy to an individual's unique genetic profile, lifestyle, and health needs.
In the near future, AI-powered autonomous vehicles could become increasingly common, transforming the transportation industry and potentially reducing accidents and traffic congestion.
AI could play a crucial role in combating climate change by optimizing energy consumption, predicting and preventing extreme weather events, and identifying areas of high carbon emissions.

cards.front: Evolving concept of work and leisure
cards.back: As AI assumes more routine and repetitive tasks, humans may focus more on creative and high-value work, leading to a redefinition of what it means to be productive and have a fulfilling life.
